title: WAL Internals: How NumStore Survives a Crash
summary: A deep dive into NumStore's write-ahead log: segment layout, fsync strategies, and how two-phase commit works under the hood.

title: Python Bindings: Design Choices and Pitfalls
summary: Why we chose ctypes over Cython, how we manage the GIL, and a walkthrough of the Python API surface.

title: Release: NumStore v1.0.0
summary: NumStore v1.0.0 is out with the core R+ tree engine, write-ahead logging, and Python/Java bindings.

title: Hello, world
summary: NumStore now has a blog. Expect concise posts on releases, performance notes, and low-level internals.
